prompt: RENDER PHASE of comprehend-visualise (read .claude/skills/comprehend-visualise/SKILL.md + appydave-plugins/appydave/skills/mochaccino/references/usage-patterns.md first). The comprehension DATA already exists at experiments/watchtower-engine/proof/cortex/data.json (+ digest.md). POSITIONING IS EVERYTHING (memory 'position-for-audience-not-structure'): the audience is David's YouTube viewers asking 'HOW DOES A BRAIN WORK?'. cortex is just the worked example. DO NOT frame around packages/monorepo/deps — frame around the brain CONCEPT. DATA-FIRST: first reframe the structural comprehension into AUDIENCE-CONCEPT data (Peter's job) written to .mochaccino/data/*.json, THEN render (Mocha). Render THREE views as Mochaccino designs: A — 'How a brain remembers & recalls' (lifecycle-flow): feed it a conversation → extracts who & what (people/facts/relationships) + lays it on a timeline + captures meaning → recall BY MEANING (blends meaning+keywords+time+who-it-knows). B — 'A brain has four kinds of memory' (card-grid): Episodic=timeline (what happened, when) · Semantic=vectors (meaning, recall by idea not keywords) · Relational=entity-graph (who & what it knows, even contradictions) · Sleep=consolidation. C — 'The brain that sleeps' (lifecycle-flow): the sleep cycle — decay old memories → tag → merge duplicates → link related → tier hot/warm/archive. HARD RULES (Mochaccino): write to the EXISTING dark-factory .mochaccino/ workspace as new designs designs/02-brain-remembers/, 03-four-memories/, 04-brain-sleeps/ (each index.html FETCHES its data/NN-*.json — MVC, never inline); Orient strip atop each (why/who/what-question); light-mode primary, AppyDave brand (brown #342d2d, gold #ccba9d, yellow #ffde59, fonts Bebas Neue/Oswald/Roboto); regenerate designs/index.html gallery (keep 01-session-journey); serve over http on the EXISTING :7422 server (it is already serving .mochaccino/ — do NOT start a new port; just regenerate files, the server picks them up) — verify with curl. Provenance: meta.source = the cortex path + commit_sha from data.json. (Reframe the structural data into concept data; do not lose provenance.) Report ONE line: the gallery URL + the 3 design names. Then complete run-next-workflow bookkeeping (run record + move to done/ + reports/ handback).
